NCT04153149.snippet: Source: Fontana M et al. NEJM 2024;391:2349-2360 (HELIOS-B).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; max age 85 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Has a documented diagnosis of transthyretin (ATTR) amyloidosis with cardiomyopathy, classified as either hereditary ATTR (hATTR) amyloidosis with cardiomyopathy or wild-type ATTR (wtATTR) amyloidosis with cardiomyopathy meeting pre-specified diagnostic criteria~* Has medical history of heart failure (HF) with at least 1 prior hospitalization for HF OR clinical evidence of HF~Exclusion Criteria:~* Has known primary amyloidosis or leptomeningeal amyloidosis~* Has New York He...

title: RapidMeta Cardiology | Vutrisiran (siRNA) in Transthyretin Amyloid Cardiomyopathy v1.0
